sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.WRITER_ID, A.DEPT_ID, IF( date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, CONCAT(substr(#startDate#,1,11), substr(A.START_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS START_DATE, IF( date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, CONCAT(substr(#endDate#,1,11), substr(A.END_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS END_DATE, A.MODAPPL, A.REGION, A.MOBILE, A.BIZSUB, A.CONTENT, A.IP, A.DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, B.TYPE_NAME$lang$ AS TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, C.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, C.DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON (C.CN = A.WRITER_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE
(
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
)
A.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND ( (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endDate#) or (date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #endDate#) or (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #endDate#) )
UNION SELECT D.ATTITUDE_ID, D.COMPANY_ID, D.TENANT_ID, D.WRITER_ID, D.DEPT_ID, IF( date_add(D.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, CONCAT(substr(#startDate#,1,11), substr(D.START_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(D.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS START_DATE, IF( date_add(D.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, CONCAT(substr(#endDate#,1,11), substr(D.END_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(D.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS END_DATE, D.MODAPPL, D.REGION, D.MOBILE, D.BIZSUB, D.CONTENT, D.IP, D.DATE_TYPE, D.TYPE_ID, E.TYPE_NAME$lang$ AS TYPE_NAME, E.IMG_PATH, F.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, F.DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM tbl_attitude D INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type E ON (D.TYPE_ID = E.TYPE_ID AND D.COMPANY_ID = E.COMPANY_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster F ON (F.CN = D.WRITER_ID AND D.COMPANY_ID = F.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND D.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER G ON (
#deptIdArr[]#
AND D.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND D.WRITER_ID = G.CN ) WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
D.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND ( (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endDate#) or (date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #endDate#) or (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #endDate#) )
) AS H
ORDER BY H.START_DATE, H.TYPE_ID
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude ( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, REGION, MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, TYPE_ID, MODAPPL ) VALUES ( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #deptId#, date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, #modappl# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_STARTDATE, CHANGE_ENDDATE, CHANGE_REGION, CHANGE_MOBILE, CHANGE_BIZSUB, CHANGE_CONTENT, CHANGE_IP, CHANGE_DATE_TYPE, CHANGE_TYPE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE ) SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, b.displayname, b.displayname2, b.title, b.title2, #deptId#, b.DESCRIPTION, b.DESCRIPTION2, date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, a.type_name, a.type_name2, #adminId#, c.displayname, c.displayname2, #apprDate# FROM (select * from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) a , (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #writerId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) b , (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #adminId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_conf WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.sql:
a.WRITER_ID = #userId#
A.WRITER_DEPT_ID = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#
A.APPR_USER_NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #apprUserName#,'%')
A.WRITER_NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerName#,'%')
A.WRITER_DEPT_NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerDeptName#,'%')
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.CHANGE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #startDate#
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.CHANGE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #endDate#
a.APPR_STATUS = #type#
AND A.DELFLAG = 0
ORDER BY $order$, A.APPL_CNT DESC
ORDER BY A.APPL_DATE DESC, A.APPL_CNT DESC
$startPoint$, $endPoint$
sqlMap.select: SELECT a.attitude_id as ATTITUDE_ID, TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(a.change_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CHANGE_DATE, a.appr_user_name$lang$ as APPR_USER_NAME, TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(a.origin_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as START_DATE, a.appr_status as APPR_STATUS, a.writer_name$lang$ as WRITER_NAME, a.writer_dept_name$lang$ as WRITER_DEPT_NAME, a.appl_cnt AS APPL_CNT, a.writer_id as WRITER_ID, TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(a.appl_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as APPL_DATE FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = b.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT TO_CHAR((to_date(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS START_DATE, WRITER_ID FROM tbl_attitude where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #ids#

SELECT a.attitude_id AS ATTITUDE_ID, TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(a.change_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHANGE_DATE, a.appr_user_name$lang$ AS APPR_USER_NAME, TO_CHAR((to_date(a.origin_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status AS APPR_STATUS, c.type_id AS TYPE_ID, c.type_name$lang$ AS TYPE_NAME, a.content AS CONTENT, a.writer_id AS WRITER_ID, a.writer_dept_id AS WRITER_DEPT_ID, a.writer_name$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, a.writer_title$lang$ AS WRITER_TITLE, a.writer_dept_name$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID inner join tbl_attitude_type c on b.TYPE_ID = c.TYPE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = c.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and a.APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
and rownum > 0 and rownum <= 1 order by a.APPL_CNT DESC

SELECT (to_date( CASE WHEN (END_DATE + (#offsetMin#/(60*24))) > #endDate# THEN #endDate# ELSE (NVL(END_DATE, START_DATE) + (#offsetMin#/(60*24))) END )
- to_date( CASE WHEN (START_DATE + (#offsetMin#/(60*24))) < #startDate# THEN #startDate# ELSE (START_DATE + (#offsetMin#/(60*24))) ) ) + COUNT(TYPE_ID) AS COUNT, TYPE_ID FROM tbl_attitude WHERE (
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03') AND ( (START_DATE >= #startDate# and START_DATE <= #endDate#) or (END_DATE >= #startDate# and END_DATE < #endDate#) or (START_DATE < #startDate# and END_DATE >= #endDate#) ) GROUP BY TYPE_ID

SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = b.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYDATE, ISSOLAR, ISREPEAT, ISREST, ISUSE, USECOMPANY FROM tbl_holidayList WHERE USECOMPANY = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND isuse = 1
AND isrest = 1
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#)t)
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MODAPPL FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = B.ATTITUDE_ID SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl#
,A.START_DATE = B.CHANGE_DATE ,A.TYPE_ID = "A02"
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
#ids[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.FORM_ID, A.FORM_HTML FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_form A INNER JOIN jmocha.tbl_attitude_type B ON A.FORM_ID = B.FORM_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND B.TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, ORIGIN_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) VALUES( #attitudeId#, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerTitle#, #writerTitle2#, #writerDeptId#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, to_date(#changeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), to_date(#originDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60))), #delFlag#, #apprStatus#, #content#, #applDate# )

INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE, CHANGE_DATE, ORIGIN_DATE, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) SELECT #attitudeId#, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #adminId#, b.DISPLAYNAME, b.DISPLAYNAME2, b.TITLE, b.TITLE2, b.DEPARTMENT, b.DESCRIPTION, b.DESCRIPTION2, #adminId#, b.DISPLAYNAME, b.DISPLAYNAME2, #apprDate#, to_date((to_date(#changeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), to_date((to_date(#originDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), "1", #content#, #applDate# FROM (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #adminId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) b
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET CONTENT = #content#, CHANGE_DATE = to_date((to_date(#changeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), APPL_DATE = #applDate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.WRITER_ID, A.DEPT_ID, (A.START_DATE + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) AS START_DATE, (A.END_DATE + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) AS END_DATE, A.MODAPPL, A.REGION, A.MOBILE, A.BIZSUB, A.CONTENT, A.IP, A.DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, B.TYPE_NAME$lang$ AS TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, C.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS DISPLAYNAME, C.DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS DESCRIPTION FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.WRITER_ID = C.CN WHERE A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,APPR_USER_ID = #userId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = #displayName# ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = #displayName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL , (SELECT displayname,displayname2 from tbl_usermaster where cn=#adminId# and tenant_id=#tenantId#) a SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,APPR_USER_ID = #adminId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = a.displayname ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = a.displayname2 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL B ON A.ATTITUDE_ID = B.ATTITUDE_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID SET
A.START_DATE = B.CHANGE_DATE
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #ids#
AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND B.APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND B.APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.TYPE_ID = #typeId# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( ATTITUDE_ID, MOD_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT ) SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, (SELECT NVL(MAX(MOD_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl_history WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]# ), COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE,
1
2 , CONTENT FROM tbl_attitude_modappl WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_attitude WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
UPDATE tbl_attitude SET TYPE_ID = #typeId#, REGION = #region#, MOBILE = #mobile#, BIZSUB = #bizSub#, CONTENT = #content#, DATE_TYPE = #dateType#, IP = #ipAddress#, START_DATE = to_date(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60)), END_DATE = (CASE WHEN #endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE (to_date(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) END)
,MODAPPL = #modappl#
WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, to_char(to_date(A.APPR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APPR_DATE A.APPR_USER_NAME$lang$ AS APPR_USER_NAME, A.APPR_STATUS, A.CONTENT, to_char(to_date(A.ORIGIN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ORIGIN_DATE to_char(to_date(A.CHANGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset# / (24 * 60)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHANGE_DATE B.TITLE$lang$ AS TITLE, B.DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.APPR_USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# ORDER BY A.APPR_DATE DESC, A.APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_STARTDATE, CHANGE_ENDDATE, CHANGE_REGION, CHANGE_MOBILE, CHANGE_BIZSUB, CHANGE_CONTENT, CHANGE_IP, CHANGE_DATE_TYPE, CHANGE_TYPE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, ATTITUDE_ID, ORIGIN_STARTDATE, ORIGIN_ENDDATE, ORIGIN_CONTENT, ORIGIN_REGION, ORIGIN_MOBILE, ORIGIN_BIZSUB, ORIGIN_IP, ORIGIN_TYPE_ID, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME2, ORIGIN_DATE_TYPE, APPR_DATE ) VALUES ( #attVO.companyId#, #tenantId#, #attVO.writerId#, #userInfo.userName#, #userInfo.userName2#, #userInfo.title#, #userInfo.title2#, #attVO.deptId#, #userInfo.deptName#, #userInfo.deptName2#, (CASE WHEN #startDate# = '' THEN null ELSE (to_date(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) END), (CASE WHEN #endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE (to_date(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) END), NVL(#region#, ''), NVL(#mobile#, ''), NVL(#bizSub#, ''), NVL(#content#, ''), NVL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, (select type_name from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #attVO.companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#), (select type_name2 from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #attVO.companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#), #adminId#, #adminInfo.userName#, #adminInfo.userName2#, #attitudeId#, (#attVO.startDate# - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))), (CASE WHEN #attVO.endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE (to_date(#attVO.endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) END), #attVO.content#, #attVO.region#, #attVO.mobile#, #attVO.bizSub#, #attVO.ip#, #attVO.typeId#, #attVO.typeName#, #attVO.typeName2#, #attVO.dateType#, #apprDate# )

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, ATTITUDE_ID, ORIGIN_STARTDATE, ORIGIN_ENDDATE, ORIGIN_CONTENT, ORIGIN_REGION, ORIGIN_MOBILE, ORIGIN_BIZSUB, ORIGIN_IP, ORIGIN_TYPE_ID, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME2, ORIGIN_DATE_TYPE, APPR_DATE ) VALUES ( #attVO.companyId#, #tenantId#, #attVO.writerId#, #userInfo.userName#, #userInfo.userName2#, #userInfo.title#, #userInfo.title2#, #attVO.deptId#, #userInfo.deptName#, #userInfo.deptName2#, #adminId#, #adminInfo.userName#, #adminInfo.userName2#, #attitudeId#, (to_date(#attVO.startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))), (CASE WHEN #attVO.endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE (to_date(#attVO.endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) END), #attVO.content#, #attVO.region#, #attVO.mobile#, #attVO.bizSub#, #attVO.ip#, #attVO.typeId#, #attVO.typeName#, #attVO.typeName2#, #attVO.dateType#, #apprDate# )
sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from tbl_attitude where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and writer_id = #writerId#
#typeIdArr[]#
and start_date >= to_date((#checkStartDate# || ' 00:00:00') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) and start_date <= to_date((#checkStartDate# || ' 23:59:59') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60)))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$
#deptIdList[]#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$
#deptIdList[]#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by CN) as RNUM, cn, displayName, extensionAttribute15, type FROM (SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$
#deptIdList[]#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT a.cn , deptid as displayName , '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_USERMASTER b INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$
#deptIdList[]#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AA ) BB AND RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow# ORDER BY DESCRIPTION

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by CN) as RNUM, cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID $strSQL$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT CN, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A $strSQL$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME

select * from(SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by CN) as RNUM, cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A $strSQL$ AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME

sqlMap.select:
SELECT appr_status as APPR_STATUS FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
and rownum > 0 and rownum <= 1 order by APPL_CNT DESC
